title: agastache anethiodora
intro: Agastache anethiodora, also known as Pineapple Mint or Licorice Mint, is a perennial plant species belonging to the mint family, Lamiaceae. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of compounds like rosmarinic acid and licorice saponins. Consuming Agastache anethiodora has been associated with various health benefits, including digestive relief, reduced stress levels, and improved respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Agastache anethiodora can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to soothe digestive issues, calm the mind, and alleviate respiratory symptoms.
